data.name: xrTableCell58.ExpressionBindings
data.value: ( IIF(!IsNullOrEmpty([EndFemBalance]), [EndFemBalance], 0) - IIF(!IsNullOrEmpty([SoldFemales]), [SoldFemales], 0) - IIF(!IsNullOrEmpty([SellFemLoss]), [SellFemLoss], 0) ) + ( IIF(!IsNullOrEmpty([EndMaleBalance]), [EndMaleBalance], 0) - IIF(!IsNullOrEmpty([SoldMales]), [SoldMales], 0) - IIF(!IsNullOrEmpty([SellMaleLoss]), [SellMaleLoss], 0) )

data.name: $this.ScriptsSource
